description: The line chart falsely implies a continuous trend or relationship between completely unrelated product sub-categories (Chairs, Phones, Storage, etc.), as if there is a meaningful progression from one category to the next. The connected line suggests that sales "decline" in a smooth, sequential pattern across these categories, when in reality these are discrete, independent groups with no inherent order or continuity. A reader might incorrectly infer that the categories exist on a spectrum or that changes between adjacent categories are meaningful.
